task: Create a first-class AIOS ask interface so the founder can issue direct work instructions through AIOS instead of manually chaining invoke, praxis, contract, and dispatch commands.

external_resource_check.reason: The first ask interface composes existing local AIOS CLIs; no current external API behavior is required.

frictions: The founder currently has to know too many internal commands to direct AIOS.
A real OS should accept intent first and build role artifacts before asking for implementation details.

specialist_assignment.strength: architecture review and operator UX critique
specialist_assignment.job: Review whether ask remains a control-plane interface and does not bypass contracts.
May draft ask instruction text, not final acceptance.
